titleStmt.title: SII 40.302: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 302. (A.R. No. B. 347 of 1933.) Vēmavaram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying by the side of the temple of Jalapālēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti Kārttīka, śu. 12, Wednesday, corresponding to 1530 A.D., November 2.

Records the construction of a tank and gift of a garden to the god Gōpinātha at Bejavada in Konḍaviḍu-sīma and also construction a maṇḍapa in the garden and consecration of the image of Hanumān and gift of lands for conducting worship by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Peda Tirumalayadēva of the Salaka family, for the merit of his parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbulu 1452 Agunēṁ
ṭi vikṛti saṁvvatsara kārttika śu 12 bu
davārāna śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
śrī Accutadēvamahārāyalu pṛ
thivi sāmrājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgā
nu śrīmatākāśyapagōtrādityavaṁśa praśa
stulu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara tu
ṁbaḷagōpu basavaśaṁkara voṁḍḍāni maṁḍḍa
likaragaṁḍḍaya ḍavaladarāya
rāhuta vēśyābhujaṁgga guttihaṁnni
bbaragaṁḍa kōṭi vimēḍivitalaguṁḍu
gaṁḍanavalakṣmī teluṁgulagaṁḍḍajagati
pu(pya)nēka biruda praśastulu salakāvaṁśa
julu lakarājaṁgāri prapautṛ lu śiṁ
ggarājugāri pautṛ lu sakalarājugā
ri putṛ lu pedatirumalayadēva ma
hārājulugāru tamatallidaṁḍṛ
laku buṁṇyamugānu koṁḍḍavīṭiki
vuttarabhāgāna bejavāḍa teruvunanu
taṭākamu gaṭṭiṁci Ātaṭakamuvadda
nu vanamu veṭiṁci Āvanamu ko
ṁḍḍavīṭi velupāleṁ miṁda gopi
nāthaniki samarpiṁci yīvanata
ṭaka samīpāna maṁḍḍapaṁ gaṭṭiṁci
hanumaṁta perumāḷanu prati

ṣṭacēsi yī hanumaṁtaperu
māḷaku Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavālu
kuṁnnu Amṛtapaḷakunnu naivēdya
kaṭaḍa mahōtsavālakunnu sama
rpiṁcina
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu .
śrīmanmaṁḍḍalanāthamōḷivila
sanmāṇikya dīpāvaḷi divyatpāda
yugācyutaśvara mahārā
yōnmi sanmānitaḥ . haimacatra
ka cāmarādika mahāsāmrā
jya sarvaṁ sahādārēya salakā
vanipatisutasmimmaprabhurva
mabhūpatimaṇisvarlōka
ciṁttāmaṇissōyaṁsthā
pitarvānaṁ sthiradhanaṁ śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
